summary: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 is closed because PR #227 passed both required CI checks, merged into origin/main, and local main fast-forwarded to 3ab56d888fc8ee344147281fd0b4f05eded4da1f. The default prototype content now uses explicit COMPOSITE topology and route graph authority instead of hidden rectangular/grid/lattice adjacency. M7 content lock remains blocked, and the next topology recovery task is M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001.

tests_run.result: PR #227 passed Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact after the CI fixture fix.

tests_run.command: gh pr merge 227 --squash --subject "feat(content): migrate M7 map topology fixture"

decisions.decision: CLOSED only after the accepted branch entered origin/main through PR #227 and local main synced to the merge commit.
Do not reopen M7 content lock from this closure; client topology rendering and topology validation remain required before product-owner reconsideration.
Continue with M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 to consume the explicit topology in the player-facing map and interaction surface.

risks.summary: Client rendering/hit testing and player-facing route semantics still need M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001.
Formal M7 content lock remains blocked until full topology recovery validation and product-owner reconsideration.

requested_action: Synchronize closure to main, close child threads, and start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001.
